notes: Portugal have no confirmed injuries or suspensions and Martinez is expected to start Ronaldo despite Goncalo Ramos' heroic impact sub role, with right-wing a rotation question between Neto, Conceicao and Bernardo Silva; confirmed starting XI shows Joao Felix and Neto ahead of Leao (bench).
